task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the configuration page for the target layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit Layer' page for the 'ne_countries' layer (in the 'ne' workspace) is visible in the GeoServer Web Administration Interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Publishing tab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publishing' tab is actively selected on the Edit Layer page.

task_completion.description: Verify the Limited SRS list is configured with the correct EPSG codes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the WMS Settings section, the 'Limited SRS list' field contains exactly 'EPSG:4326' and 'EPSG:3857' (comma-separated, order does not matter).

task_completion.description: Verify the response policy is set to exclude other SRS codes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The setting for unlisted/other SRS (e.g., 'Other SRS' dropdown or radio button) is set to 'Exclude' or an equivalent option that prevents the use of unlisted SRS codes.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration changes were saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' button at the bottom of the page, or a success message is shown at the top of the Layers list indicating the layer was successfully saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GeoServer Web Administration Interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the GeoServer GUI in a web browser, not using terminal commands (like curl) to modify the REST API.

integrity.description: Verify genuine interaction with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show actual navigation through the GeoServer menus and forms, rather than just a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to manipulate the DOM or fake the success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target workspace: 'ne'. Target layer: 'ne_countries'. Expected SRS list: 'EPSG:4326' and 'EPSG:3857'. GeoServer URL: http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/. Admin credentials: admin / Admin123!. The task requires modifying the WMS Settings in the Publishing tab of the layer configuration to limit the SRS list and set the policy to exclude others.
